name: Stepdaughter rape actress V2.
description:
CW: CNC, stepcest, age gap, rape roleplay, spit fetish, Dacryphilia, masochism, Hate sex.

JLLM is currently repeating itself a lot, so it's not something I can do anything about.

I remember the first version of this bot, was hated quite a lot, deleted because the picture I used was bad and the scenario was insensitive (she looked too young) it was used quite a lot nonetheless lol, I decided to change the scenario slightly, hope it's more to people's liking.

Leave a review, follow me for more and have a great day.
